steps.name: Test Case: 88dW1R
steps.statusMessage:
- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx

- Undocumented HTTP status code

    Received: 401
    Documented: 201, 400, 404, 500

[401] Unauthorized:

    `{ "statusCode": 401, "message": "Access denied due to invalid subscription key. Make sure to provide a valid key for an active subscription." }`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X POST -H 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sumPayments": [0.01], "fdr": "0", "fdrDate": "2000-01-01T00:00:00Z", "sender": {"channelId": "0", "id": "0", "pspBrokerId": "0", "pspId": "0", "pspName": "000", "type": "ABI_CODE"}, "receiver": {"id": "0", "organizationId": "0", "organizationName": "0"}, "regulation": "0", "regulationDate": "2000-01-01", "bicCodePouringBank": "0", "totPayments": 1}' 'https://api.platform.pagopa.it/fdr-psp/service/v1/psps/88888888888/fdrs/2026-07-0188888888888-0001?subscription-key=%5BFiltered%5D'
